scripts.build: npm run build:standard && npm run build:protected
scripts.build:standard: vite build && npm run build --prefix compress_pdf && node scripts/prerender_routes.js dist && node scripts/verify_prerender_routes.js dist && node generate_manifest.js
scripts.build:protected: vite build --mode protected && npm run build:protected --prefix compress_pdf && node scripts/obfuscate_build.js obfuscated_dist && node scripts/prerender_routes.js obfuscated_dist && node scripts/verify_prerender_routes.js obfuscated_dist && node generate_manifest.js obfuscated_dist Cloudflare.obfuscated.txt
